/admin/content/files.reason: No enabled route currently, but the DISABLED view files:page_1 (views.view.files) declares this exact path; enabling it would collide. It is also an admin route path, not a content-alias surface. Risky.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: No enabled route currently, but the DISABLED view scheduler_scheduled_media:overview (views.view.scheduler_scheduled_media) declares this path; enabling it would collide. Also an admin route path, not a content-alias surface. Risky.

/blog.reason: Claimed: it is the canonical page of canvas_page entity 2 ('Blog'). Alias /blog maps to /page/2 via enabled route entity.canvas_page.canonical. A new node alias would collide.

/moderated-content.reason: Unclaimed: no route, alias, view, or entity responds, and a full view scan found no display claiming it. Safe despite the suggestive name.

/search.reason: Claimed by the Views page display search:page (views.view.search, enabled route view.search.page). A node with alias /search would shadow and hijack the view.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Unclaimed: no route, alias, view, or entity responds to this path, and no latent/disabled-view claims. Safe for a new node alias.
